mapper.sql: id, truck_id, start_date, end_date, type, description, cost
mapper.insert:
SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID()
insert into maintenance_record
truck_id,
start_date,
end_date,
type,
description,
cost,
#{truckId,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{startDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{endDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{type,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{description,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{cost,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
mapper.update:
update maintenance_record
truck_id = #{truckId,jdbcType=INTEGER},
start_date = #{startDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
end_date = #{endDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
type = #{type,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
description = #{description,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
cost = #{cost,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}

update maintenance_record set truck_id = #{truckId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, start_date = #{startDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, end_date = #{endDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, type = #{type,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, description = #{description,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, cost = #{cost,jdbcType=DECIMAL} where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}
mapper.select: select id, truck_id, start_date, end_date, type, description, cost from maintenance_record
